name: academorix/database
description: Data-layer building blocks for every Academorix module: base Model + schema Blueprint macros + data-shaping attributes (Searchable, Translatable, Metadatable, Sluggable, Sortable, Taggable, UserStamped, UuidColumn, Archivable, StatusColumn) + model concern traits (HasArchive, HasSlug, HasSortOrder, HasStatus, HasTags, HasUserStamp, HasUuid, HasMetadata, HasTranslations, HasPrefixedUlid, HasSystemFlag, HasMockableStorage, InteractsWithMedia). Answers 'what the data IS' — pair with academorix/crud for 'how the data is QUERIED' and academorix/caching for tag-based invalidation.

suggest.spatie/laravel-medialibrary: Required by the InteractsWithMedia concern for file/image attachments.
suggest.waad/laravel-model-metadata: Required by the HasMetadata concern for polymorphic key/value metadata.
suggest.calebporzio/sushi: Required by the HasMockableStorage concern for fixture-backed models.
